title: 내 자동차를 의인화한 미국 배경 모델 사진
image: examples/image/avatar/내 자동차를 의인화한 미국 배경 모델 사진/내 자동차를 의인화한 미국 배경 모델 사진.webp
prompt:
Use the uploaded vehicle photo as the main reference for both the car and the personified human character.

Create a wide 16:9 ultra-realistic editorial fashion photo in the same composition as the reference concept: a retro American diner exterior in the background, warm sunny afternoon light, pastel vintage atmosphere, palm trees, a large diner sign, outdoor chairs, umbrellas, glass windows, nostalgic drive-in mood, and clean cinematic lifestyle photography. The overall background color palette should not remain fixed. Instead, the diner building, signage, outdoor furniture, umbrellas, trims, and decorative elements should use a coordinated retro pastel color scheme that harmonizes with the uploaded vehicle’s main body color and accent colors.

Place the uploaded user’s vehicle in front of the retro diner, parked at a slight front three-quarter angle. The vehicle must accurately reflect the uploaded car’s real design, body shape, proportions, color, headlights, grille, wheels, and distinctive details. Do not replace it with a different car model. Keep the vehicle recognizable as the exact uploaded car.

Transform the uploaded vehicle into a young adult Korean woman character sitting naturally on the front hood of the same vehicle. The woman is the human personification of the uploaded car. Her overall visual identity must be directly derived from the uploaded vehicle’s body shape, proportions, design language, trim, color palette, silhouette, mood, and distinctive styling cues.

Her physical appearance, facial impression, hairstyle, and outfit style must change depending on the uploaded vehicle. Do not keep the same generic character design for every car. Instead, interpret the car’s personality as a human. If the car feels sporty, make her look sharper, more sleek, chic, and dynamic. If the car feels elegant or premium, make her look refined, poised, sophisticated, and graceful. If the car feels cute, compact, or friendly, give her a softer, more youthful, approachable, and delicate charm. If the car feels bold, strong, or rugged, make her feel more confident, stylish, and powerful.

Her face should reflect the vehicle’s identity. The facial impression, eye shape, makeup mood, expression, and overall aura should be inspired by the uploaded vehicle’s styling language. Keep her attractive, natural, and photorealistic, but make her identity feel meaningfully tied to the uploaded vehicle.

Her hairstyle must also be influenced by the uploaded vehicle. Adjust the hair length, silhouette, volume, texture, and styling according to the car’s personality and shape. Hair color should remain realistic, but it may subtly reflect the vehicle’s palette, undertones, or overall visual mood.

Her outfit style must also change depending on the uploaded vehicle, while still fitting the retro diner fashion editorial setting. The outfit should be a fashion interpretation of the car’s identity. It may be a fitted sleeveless mini dress, a sleek tailored set, a chic modern one-piece, or a sporty fitted look depending on what best matches the uploaded vehicle. Use the vehicle’s main body color and accent colors as the base palette, and incorporate subtle design details inspired by the grille, headlights, wheel design, trim lines, emblem shape, or other distinctive features. She wears matching high heels in the same main color family as the outfit, unless a different elegant shoe style better suits the car-inspired fashion concept.

The woman should sit properly on the hood, positioned near the front-center area of the car, with one hand resting lightly on the hood and the other hand placed naturally beside her body. Her legs are crossed gracefully and angled downward toward the front bumper. Her posture should look stable, natural, and editorial, like a fashion magazine car photoshoot.

Keep the camera pulled back with generous empty space around the subject. The full car, full body of the woman, diner building, signage, outdoor furniture, and surrounding retro street atmosphere should all be visible. Use a balanced wide composition with the woman and car placed slightly right of center, leaving spacious background and foreground.

The representative colors used in the building and surrounding visual elements must also adapt to the uploaded vehicle. Use the car’s main body color, secondary tones, and accent details as inspiration for the diner’s facade, sign accents, chair colors, parasols, window trims, and other environmental design elements. The result should feel color-coordinated and intentional, as if the entire scene was art-directed around the uploaded vehicle. Keep the palette tasteful, retro, pastel-toned, and visually harmonious, while still preserving the nostalgic American diner atmosphere.

The car may be subtly decorated or custom-painted to harmonize with the retro diner atmosphere, but it must still remain recognizable as the uploaded vehicle. Add tasteful pastel accents, thin side stripes, matching wheel details, or small retro-inspired trim elements that complement the scene’s vehicle-inspired color palette and the personified character’s outfit.

The vehicle’s license plate must be obscured, covered, blurred, or blocked so that no plate number is visible.

Add a small watermark text "@tting_ssam" in the bottom-right corner. The watermark should be clean, subtle, low-opacity, and naturally placed so it does not distract from the image.

Lighting: warm golden-hour sunlight, soft shadows, natural reflections on the car body, glossy highlights, realistic skin texture, natural hair shine, gentle cinematic color grading, shallow but not overly blurred depth of field. The image should feel like a high-end magazine photoshoot with a nostalgic retro summer mood.

Style: ultra-realistic photography, high-detail photorealism, editorial fashion photo, cinematic composition, natural body proportions, realistic car scale, realistic anatomy, clean details, soft film grain, premium lifestyle advertising mood.

Negative prompt:
different car, wrong vehicle model, inaccurate car design, distorted car, fake grille, wrong headlights, wrong wheels, low-quality car details, deformed vehicle, unrealistic car scale, floating person, unstable sitting pose, bad anatomy, extra fingers, extra limbs, distorted hands, warped face, doll-like face, generic repeated character design, same face for every car, same hairstyle for every car, same outfit for every car, same background colors for every car, anime, illustration, cartoon, CGI, 3D render, overly plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, excessive beauty filter, overly sexualized pose, explicit nudity, lingerie, transparent clothing, messy background, unreadable signs, wrong text, visible license plate number, misspelled watermark, large watermark, distracting logo, cropped body, cropped car, too close-up, no empty space, studio background.

title: 내 차로 강렬한 인상의 여캐릭터 설정 만들기
image: examples/image/avatar/내 차로 강렬한 인상의 여캐릭터 설정 만들기/내 차로 강렬한 인상의 여캐릭터 설정 만들기.webp
prompt:
Use the uploaded car image as the only vehicle reference.

Analyze the car’s real design, body color, front impression, headlights, grille, body lines, wheels, windows, sunroof presence, and overall mood. Based on that analysis, create a young adult female character who feels like the human personification of the car.

Create the final image as a premium automotive personification character sheet.

---

[Core Goal]

- The character must feel as if the uploaded car has transformed into a woman.
- Her face, hairstyle, outfit, accessories, color palette, personality, and overall mood must be derived from the car’s design and atmosphere.
- Do not create a generic beautiful girl. The character must clearly reflect the identity of the uploaded car.
- The final image should combine the feeling of a luxury car catalog, character design sheet, fashion illustration, and premium design board.

---

[Automatic Analysis Rules]

1. Car Mood Analysis
- Analyze the uploaded car’s color, shape, front design, headlights, grille, body lines, wheels, and overall emotional impression.
- Automatically decide the image mood based on the car.
- Possible moods include refined, calm, sporty, cute, luxurious, futuristic, powerful, elegant, urban, clean, dynamic, or premium.

2. Character Name
- Automatically create a Korean character name that matches the mood of the car.
- The name must be between 1 and 4 Korean characters.
- Display the name prominently in the top title area.

3. Vehicle Information Restrictions
- Do not display the vehicle year.
- Do not display the vehicle grade, trim, or model rank.
- Instead, describe the car through its key features, visual impression, atmosphere, and design personality.

---

[Layout]

- Vertical character setting sheet format.
- Clean white background.
- Use thin line boxes, metallic accents, and accent colors that match the car’s mood.
- Place a large full-body illustration of the character in the center.
- Place character information boxes on the left side.
- Place expression cuts, side view, back view, and design detail cuts on the right side.
- Place a vehicle illustration or vehicle cut based on the uploaded car at the bottom.
- Add subtle automotive graphic elements such as headlight line graphics, wheel graphics, glass or sunroof-like panels, and futuristic UI-style lines.
- The entire layout must look organized, premium, and similar to a professional character profile board.

---

[Character Design]

- Young adult female character.
- Elegant Korean semi-realistic anime style.
- Clear, expressive eyes.
- Clean and smooth skin rendering.
- Natural and beautiful face shape.
- Hairstyle and hair color should match the atmosphere of the uploaded car.
- Slim, balanced fashion-model body proportions.
- Use the car’s main body color as the character’s main design color.
- Use the car’s secondary colors, black trim, chrome, silver wheels, and light colors as outfit accents.
- Reflect the headlight impression in the character’s eyes and eye makeup.
- Reflect the grille and body lines in the outfit seams, jacket structure, belt, and decorative lines.
- Subtly reflect the wheel design in earrings, brooches, shoe details, belt ornaments, or metallic accessories.
- Do not directly copy the vehicle logo or emblem. Use abstract symbols or decorative elements instead.

---

[Outfit Direction]

- Design a high-end fashion outfit inspired by the uploaded car’s design language.
- Use jackets, coats, skirts, pants, boots, heels, gloves, belts, chains, or metallic details depending on the car’s mood.
- Reflect the car’s sharp edges, curves, speed, stability, elegance, or premium feeling in the outfit silhouette.
- The outfit alone should visually communicate the personality of the car.

---

[Left Information Boxes]

Place the following sections on the left side.
All visible text in the image must be written in Korean.

1. PROFILE
- Name
- Motif
- Key Features
- Core Point
- Gender
- Image

2. Appearance Points
- Hair
- Eyes
- Skin Tone
- Body Shape
- Outfit Colors
- Vehicle Design Point

3. Personality Keywords
- 4 to 5 keywords that match the car’s mood.

4. Design Concept
- Briefly explain how the car’s color, front design, lights, body lines, wheels, and overall atmosphere are reflected in the character.

5. Color Palette
- Four circular color chips.
- Main color
- Sub color
- Dark point color
- Metallic or light accent color

6. One-line Introduction
- A short and stylish sentence that expresses the charm of the uploaded car as a character.

---

[Right Setting Cuts]

Place the following elements on the right side.

1. Three Expression Cuts
- Soft smile
- Calm expression
- Confident or slightly chic expression

2. Side Full-body View
- Show the hairstyle flow and outfit silhouette clearly.

3. Back Full-body View
- Show the back details of the outfit, hair, and decorative elements inspired by the car.

4. Design Point Box
- Hair
- Eyes
- Outfit Details
- Mood

Each explanation must be connected to the visual features of the uploaded car.

---

[Vehicle Representation]

- Place an illustration or image-style rendering of the uploaded car at the bottom.
- Preserve the car’s real color, body proportions, front design, headlights, grille, wheels, and key details as accurately as possible.
- Do not change it into a different car model.
- Add subtle light, reflection, and catalog-style floor reflections around the vehicle.

---

[Art Style and Quality]

- Premium semi-realistic anime illustration.
- Korean-style beautiful female character design.
- Professional character setting sheet.
- Luxury automotive design board.
- Delicate hair rendering.
- Clear and glossy eyes.
- Soft skin highlights.
- Refined fashion rendering.
- Clean studio-like lighting.
- Organized information layout.
- Ultra-high resolution.
- 4K quality.
- Clean line art.
- Premium character sheet.
- Luxury automotive design board.

---

[Watermark]

- Add the watermark text "@tting_ssam" in the bottom-right corner of the image.
- Make it clearly readable even on a white background.
- Keep it small, clean, and stylish so it does not disturb the overall design.
- The watermark must be visible and identifiable.

---

[Important Conditions]

- Keep the identity of the uploaded car.
- Do not change the car into a different model.
- The character must be derived from the car’s design and mood.
- Do not display the vehicle year, grade, trim, or rank anywhere in the image.
- The character name must be automatically created based on the car’s atmosphere and must be 1 to 4 Korean characters.
- All visible text in the image should be mainly in Korean.
- The final result must look like one complete premium character setting sheet.
- Keep the design clean and organized, not overly crowded.

---

[Negative Prompt]

low quality, blurry, distorted car, wrong car model, random vehicle, inaccurate vehicle details, different car color, poorly drawn wheels, deformed headlights, messy layout, unreadable text, cluttered background, bad anatomy, extra fingers, broken hands, bad proportions, inconsistent character, duplicated character, cropped body, random logo, excessive decoration

title: 블랙화이트톤의 데스크테리어 피규어 만들기
image: examples/image/avatar/블랙화이트톤의 데스크테리어 피규어 만들기/블랙화이트톤의 데스크테리어 피규어 만들기.webp
prompt:
Use the uploaded photo as the only identity reference for the person. Transform the person from the uploaded image into a soft, cute mini SD figure with a small, adorable collectible toy feeling. Preserve the person’s facial impression, hairstyle, and overall vibe, while reinterpreting them as a tiny, squishy-looking chibi figure with rounded proportions, charming toy-like form, and polished figure details.

The scene takes place on top of a stylish black-and-white gaming desk setup. Show the figure sitting on the gaming table, captured in a close-up composition. The sitting pose should clearly show the soles of the shoes, with the legs naturally extended forward or slightly lifted toward the camera.

The outfit should be redesigned with a gaming-inspired fashion concept, while still matching the uploaded person’s vibe. Use a cute and trendy look with black-and-white tones, such as a hoodie, short skirt or shorts, stylish sneakers, and subtle gaming-themed accessories like a headset or small gamer details.

Give the figure a playful, mischievous expression. The face should feel lively, cute, and cheeky, with bright eyes and a fun smile.

Add subtle gaming desk elements around the figure, such as a black-and-white keyboard, mouse, mousepad, part of a monitor, and clean LED lighting accents. The overall atmosphere should combine a cute mini SD collectible figure aesthetic with a clean and modern gaming desk mood.

Use a highly realistic desk photography lighting setup. The main light should be a soft diffused key light coming from the upper front-left of the camera, illuminating the figure’s face and upper body clearly and naturally. Add a subtle cool monitor glow as a secondary fill light, creating gentle highlights on the face, shoes, and desk surface. In the background, use soft white or cool white LED ambient lighting to create a believable gaming desk atmosphere. Keep the overall color temperature in a neutral to slightly cool range, around 4300K to 5000K. Avoid overly saturated RGB neon lighting. The lighting should feel natural and photographic, with soft realistic contact shadows under the figure and on the desk surface.

The mood should be clean, premium, modern, indoor nighttime desk photography, with a calm and stylish atmosphere that still lets the cute playful figure stand out. Keep the figure as the clear main subject, sharply in focus, while the background is slightly blurred for depth. High detail, premium toy-like texture, soft lighting, charming collectible figure photography style.

[Watermark]

- Add the watermark text "@tting_ssam" in the bottom-right corner of the image.
- The watermark position must be fixed at the bottom-right corner of the image.
- Set the font color to hex code "#FFFFFF".
- Set the watermark transparency to 20, where 100 means fully transparent.
- This means the watermark should appear as white text with about 80% opacity.
- Keep the watermark small, clean, and stylish.
- The watermark must be clearly readable but should not disturb the overall design.

Aspect ratio: 4:5 vertical.

title: 사물이나 음식을 2등신 SD캐릭터로 생성
image: examples/image/avatar/사물이나 음식을 2등신 SD캐릭터로 생성/사물이나 음식을 2등신 SD캐릭터로 생성.webp
prompt: Transform the object in the attached photo into a 2-head-tall SD moe character. Use the object's shape, colors, textures, and distinctive features as the character’s accessories, outfit details, or point colors. Express the character as either a male or female human character. Create a rough sketch character sheet on a clean white background. Include one full-body character illustration and six small face or half-body cut illustrations. Include one very tiny mini version of the character. Add cute doodles such as hearts, stars, handwritten memo notes, and speech bubbles. Randomly design the character’s expressions, poses, and props to match the concept of the object. All text used in the image must be written in Korean. Add a clearly visible watermark “@tting_ssam” in the bottom-right corner. Since the background is white, automatically adjust the watermark color, opacity, thickness, or subtle outline so that it remains readable while blending naturally with the rough sketch character sheet style.

title: 해변가 햇빛이 눈부셔 피규어 만들기
image: examples/image/avatar/해변가 햇빛이 눈부셔 피규어 만들기/해변가 햇빛이 눈부셔 피규어 만들기.webp
prompt:
Use the uploaded user photo as the only identity reference for the face.

Create a cute SD-style 3D figure of the person from the uploaded photo. Transform the real person into a small, adorable collectible-style chibi figure while preserving the person’s facial impression, hairstyle, and overall vibe. The result should clearly feel like the uploaded person reinterpreted as a cute SD figure, not a different character.

Render the character as a high-quality 3D figurine with a polished toy-like finish, soft rounded proportions, and charming collectible details. Keep the overall style cute, clean, premium, and visually appealing.

Outfit rules:
- If the person in the uploaded photo is male, dress the figure in a white T-shirt, an unbuttoned sky-blue shirt, and blue Hawaiian shorts.
- If the person in the uploaded photo is female, dress the figure in a white oversized shirt with a subtle sheer look, paired with denim shorts.

Expression:
- Give the figure an excited, fluttering, thrilled expression, as if enjoying the bright seaside atmosphere with a sense of anticipation and delight.

Composition and framing:
- 4:5 vertical image
- top-down view from a slightly elevated angle
- the figure should occupy about 60% of the frame
- place the figure on a beach setting
- include clear beach sand and seaside surroundings
- the figure is looking up toward the sky
- the figure is making a pose where one hand is raised to shade the sunlight
- the pose should feel natural, lively, and cute

Background and environment:
- bright, refreshing beach atmosphere
- clear seaside mood
- clean sand texture visible
- fresh, cool ocean colors
- vivid but natural blue tones
- overall image should feel bright, clear, breezy, and summery

Mood and color:
- refreshing
- cool seaside palette
- bright and clean lighting
- clear sky feeling
- cheerful and crisp summer atmosphere

Important requirements:
- preserve the identity and vibe of the uploaded person
- keep the result in a cute SD character style
- make it clearly a 3D figure, not a flat illustration
- include the beach and sand as essential visual elements
- no excessive retouching
- no unnecessary text
- no text except an optional watermark if needed
- avoid finger errors and malformed hands
- maintain clean anatomy within the SD figure style

Watermark 
- Add the watermark text "@tting_ssam" in the bottom-right corner of the image. 
- The watermark position must be fixed at the bottom-right corner of the image. 
- Set the font color to hex code "#FFFFFF". 
- Set the watermark transparency to 20, where 100 means fully transparent. 
- This means the watermark should appear as white text with about 80% opacity. 
- Keep the watermark small, clean, and stylish. 
- The watermark must be clearly readable but should not disturb the overall design.

image: examples/image/cosplay/핑크빛 꽃잎 속 판타지 코스프레/핑크빛 꽃잎 속 판타지 코스프레.webp

She is wearing dark sorceress robe and black demon horns, with cool charismatic gaze and fluffy twin-tail hairstyle, holding ribbons in the air with elegant calm expression. Include a small, elegant, semi-transparent watermark text "@tting_ssam" fixed at the bottom-right corner of the image, clearly readable yet unobtrusive and naturally integrated into the composition.
